query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'clientes' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('tipoPessoa', 'segmento', 'inscricaoEstadual', 'inscricaoMunicipal', 'celular', 'nomeContato', 'agencia', 'conta', 'tipoConta', 'cep', 'logradouro');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3uWnMYqJSMV9zcU.root --database eCW2qMCc4P3oBzxQMhj7Zi --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'clientes' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('tipoPessoa', 'segmento', 'inscricaoEstadual', 'inscricaoMunicipal', 'celular', 'nomeContato', 'agencia', 'conta', 'tipoConta', 'cep', 'logradouro');
